{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42555", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary

Multiple classes evaluate Spring Expression Language (SpEL) expressions from user-supplied input using `StandardEvaluationContext`, which provides unrestricted access to Java types and methods. An authenticated user with the ADMIN role can achieve Remote Code Execution and credential exfiltration.

### Impact

An attacker with ADMIN credentials can:
- **Execute arbitrary OS commands** via `T(java.lang.Runtime).getRuntime().exec('...')`
- **Exfiltrate all environment variables** (database passwords, API keys, Keycloak secrets) via `T(java.lang.System).getenv()`
- **Read JVM system properties** via `T(java.lang.System).getProperties()`
- **Load arbitrary classes** via `T(java.lang.Class).forName('...')`

### Affected Components

**1. DocumentMigrationService** (since 12.0.0)

Exploitable through the document migration REST API:
- `POST /api/management/v1/document-definition/migrate`
- `POST /api/management/v1/document-definition/migration/conflicts`

The malicious SpEL expression is supplied in the `source` or `target` field of a `DocumentMigrationPatch` object in the request body, using the `${...}` template syntax.

- In 12.x: `com.ritense.document.service.DocumentMigrationService#handleSpelExpression` (document module)
- In 13.x: same class, moved to the case module

**2. Condition** (since 13.4.0)

Exploitable through any admin-configured widget, dashboard, or feature that uses the `Condition` framework. The SpEL expression is supplied in the `value` field of a condition's JSON configuration.

- `com.ritense.valtimo.contract.conditions.Condition#resolveValue` (contract module)

This component has a significantly wider attack surface than DocumentMigrationService, as conditions are used across many modules.

### Remediation

Replace `StandardEvaluationContext` with `SimpleEvaluationContext` in both affected classes, which disallows Java type references and arbitrary method invocation:

```kotlin
val evaluationContext = SimpleEvaluationContext
    .forPropertyAccessors(MapAccessor(), jsonPropertyAccessor)
    .build()
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00576, "percentile": 0.43583}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:41:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42555"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T17:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:41:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/valtimo-platform/valtimo/security/advisories/GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42555", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/valtimo-platform/valtimo/security-advisories/GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/valtimo-platform/valtimo", "summary": "Valtimo has SpEL injection via StandardEvaluationContext that allows Remote Code Execution by admin users", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:52:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7j9-5253-f7vh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.32.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.ritense.valtimo:document"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 12.0.0, < 12.32.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "13.23.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.ritense.valtimo:case"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.0.0, < 13.23.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "13.23.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.ritense.valtimo:contract"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.4.0, < 13.23.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
title: Valtimo has SpEL injection via StandardEvaluationContext that allows Remote Code Execution by admin users
